# Regression check for the PRCache wiring bug: with PRCache wired, pressing
# `p` on a worktree with an open PR should show "opening …", not "no PR".
width 140
height 40
wait 200ms
keys j
key down
keys p
# Capture before any cmd-cascade so the "opening..." notice is visible.
# After the cascade, openURLCmd's prOpenedMsg clears the notice.
capture /tmp/canopy-demo-open-pr.txt
